name: Potato Cheddar and Ale Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute carrots and celery in butter until tender.
2. Add potatoes, flour, fennel, and pepper. Saute for 1-2 minutes.
3. Add stock; cook for 20-30 minutes until vegetables are tender and potatoes break up.
4. Add ale and gently boil for 10 minutes.
5. Add milk and heat thoroughly.
6. Remove from heat and cool to 180°F or lower.
7. Stir in cheese. Adjust seasoning with salt.
8. Portion into bowls and garnish with shredded cheese.
9. Serve with bread.
